notes: 8x8 strategic overview grounded in Elitez Security deck (R00, 15 Apr 2023). Canvas dimensions reflect deck-stated differentiators: PWM-compliant pricing discipline, no-double-shift officer welfare, SSIA/PWM+ compliance depth, tech-augmented manpower reduction with documented case studies, group HR/training depth (Adept Academy + Elitez parent + Hey Rocket + NTUC USE), 24/7 manned command centre, MCST/residential trust track record, and documented cost-saving case studies (6 sites, $14.6k/mo aggregate). Aviation specialism and robotics partnerships are deliberately excluded — neither exists in Elitez Security's actual stack per the deck.

us_scores_rationale.Price defensibility (PWM-compliant, no r: Deck explicitly states 'won't undercut — follow PWM/MOM authority requirements'; PWM+ Mark certified, so floor pricing is enforced not optional, protecting margin and quality.
us_scores_rationale.Officer welfare / no double shift: Deck has explicit STRICTLY NO double-shift policy + 'one of the highest salaries in industry' + 60-day hospitalisation + NTUC Union + quarterly $50 food packs — recruitment moat vs. industry attrition.
us_scores_rationale.PWM+/SSIA/ISO compliance depth: Awarded all 3 SSIA 2023 categories (Commercial Special Mention, Industrial Rising Star, Residential Tier 2) plus bizSAFE Star, NS Mark Gold, ISO 45001:2018, PWM+ Mark, TAFEP — a credential stack rare among ~250 SG agencies.
us_scores_rationale.Tech-augmented manpower reduction: Deck stack: AI-CCTV line-crossing, LPR, PDPA-compliant VMS, virtual clocking, anti-exhaustion MDVR, modular guard houses, facial recognition — sold as manpower-cut narrative not feature list.
us_scores_rationale.Group HR / training depth: Adept Academy WSQ MOU (50–90% govt funding) + Elitez parent recruitment volume + Hey Rocket blue-collar pipeline + NTUC USE backing — 5-channel pipeline no sub-500-guard agency can match.
us_scores_rationale.24/7 command centre capability: HQ at CT Hub houses a 24/7 manned Live Remote Command Centre offering virtual guard house, free onsite risk assessment, free install up to 250m cable, no upfront, full warranty.
us_scores_rationale.Residential MCST trust track record: Deck-named residential clients include Park Infinia, Hillsta, Hillington Green (won SSIA 2023 Buyer of the Year), Northwave EC, La Casa EC, Sims Urban Oasis, St Regis Residences, Blue Horizon, CityLife Tampines — but residential is contested by Metropolis/Centurion so we score 4 not 5.
us_scores_rationale.Documented cost-saving case studies: 6 named sites with quantified $/mo savings: Junction Nine $2.0k, Fu Lu Shou $1.8k, St Joseph's Church $4.2k, Hillington Green $1.2k, Hillsta $4.2k, Ju Eng Home $1.2k = $14.6k/mo aggregate, ~$350k over 2 yrs — proof not promise.
